scripts.check: node --check assets/js/main.js && node --check assets/js/page-fixes.js && node --check service-worker.js && node --check firebase-messaging-sw.js && node --check netlify/functions/alarabiya-news.js && node --check netlify/functions/alarabiya-news-v2.js && node --check netlify/functions/alarabiya-image.js && npm --prefix functions run check
scripts.validate: npm run check && npm test && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('functions/package.json','utf8'));" && git diff --check
